subject: [PATCH v2 1/3] cgroup: reduce cgroup_file_kn_lock hold time in cgroup_file_notify()

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch reduces the hold time of cgroup_file_kn_lock in cgroup_file_notify() by taking a kernfs_get() reference under the lock and calling kernfs_notify() after dropping it, following the pattern from cgroup_file_show(). This change aims to improve performance by minimizing the global spinlock's hold time.
